title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at Pratham Education Capital India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at Pratham Education Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Pratham Education Capital India family as a Teacher in Surat. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Pratham Education Capital India:
Pratham Education Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pratham Education Capital India!
